product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I came across your listing for the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch and I'm really interested in purchasing it. I was wondering if there was any possibility of negotiating the price? Looking forward to hearing from you soon. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch. While I can't go below the wholesale price, I can offer it to you for $2,300. Let me know if this works for you! Thank you for considering.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer! I appreciate your willingness to negotiate. Unfortunately, $2,300 is still above my budget. I'll have to pass on this offer. Thank you.
